Title: User Registration
Preconditions: Application is launched and no user is currently logged in.
Test Data:
- Email: testuser@example.com
- Password: P@ssw0rd
- Username: TestUser
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the registration page.
3. Enter the email, password, and username.
4. Submit the registration form.
Expected Result:
- A confirmation message appears indicating successful registration.
- The user is redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login page.
3. Enter the email and password.
4. Submit the login form.
Expected Result:
- The user is logged in successfully.
- The user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Invalid User Login
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login page.
3. Enter the email and incorrect password.
4. Submit the login form.
Expected Result:
- An error message appears indicating invalid credentials.
- The user remains on the login page.
